name: Sinsera Node 3 — Vigil camera wall (Pi Zero 2 W → 75" TV, framebuffer)
description: Pi Zero 2 W that renders the 4 Eufy cameras (Back/Door/Front/Front Yard) as a 2x2 grid FULLSCREEN on the HDMI framebuffer — Pygame on SDL kmsdrm, NO browser (the Zero 2 W can't run WPE/cog). Pulls JPEG snapshots from the eufy bridge (192.168.4.163:8091/snap/<serial>) ~1.5fps/tile + /status for the motion/live border. LAN-local over wifi. LCD HAT disabled (HDMI is the only display), forced 1080p, gpu_mem=128. Lean: no Claude/USB-builder/WireGuard.

preconfigured.user: peta (SSH-key, NOPASSWD sudo); renderer runs as 'wall' on tty1 autologin
preconfigured.network: wifi (baked from ~/.ark/wifi.env); LAN-local to the bridge

notes: UNVERIFIED on hardware — built without a Zero 2 W to test; expect on-Pi tuning (kmsdrm mode, tile fps, LCD-HAT backlight pin).
LCD HAT: dtparam=spi=off + a best-effort backlight-off on GPIO 18/24/13. If the HAT stays lit, find its real backlight pin and edit /usr/local/sbin/lcd-hat-off.sh.
Snapshots, not live video — deliberate, to keep the Zero 2 W smooth. Bump VIGIL_TILE_FPS if the chip handles more.
Repurposes the vigil-cam Pi: flash to a SEPARATE SD so the vigil-cam card stays intact for swapping back.
